beats.activity: Work: afternoon shift, customer consultations, route planning

Georgetown to Northgate is a 45-min ride; evening is cooling and breezy—perfect cycling conditions. Mateo leaves before rush and Pride crowds build downtown.

beats.activity: Quick dinner and freshen up at home

world_event_prompt: Warm, breezy Friday, high of 77F. Seattle Pride kickoff: Capitol Hill street fair and road closures along Broadway and Pike from 5pm. Festive, busy evening downtown.
